seoTitle: Constitution Hill vs Coogee — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Constitution Hill and Coogee. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Constitution Hill vs Coogee: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Constitution Hill and Coogee.
heading: Constitution Hill vs Coogee — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Constitution Hill, New South Wales and Coogee, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Constitution Hill has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Coogee (46/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Constitution Hill or Coogee safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Constitution Hill has a flood risk score of 32/100, while Coogee scores 54/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Constitution Hill scores 23/100 for bushfire risk. Coogee scores 34/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Constitution Hill or Coogee?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Constitution Hill has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.4% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
